researchSkipReason: No external library/framework to adopt — everything is a sibling artifact (gate/forge Dockerfiles+compose) or a thin authored Dockerfile. Verified build recipes from sibling source instead.

build_required.summary: Real gate in the smoke: reuse flint-gate Dockerfile + its compose services (gate :4457 admin + postgres:16 + kratos); wire FPA_GATE_ADMIN_URL -> gate admin
fabric: recommend STUB /healthz (gateway hard-depends on iggy+keto+surreal -> real fabric = full 6-svc compose for one health check). Operator confirms real-vs-stub at spec
Real forge: reuse forge CI PG image (docker/postgres/Dockerfile — pg_graphql .deb + pgvector); apply migrations via `sqlx migrate run --source migrations`

Author fdb-gateway Dockerfile (none exists) — thin multi-stage rust build (runtime sqlx, no DB-at-build; exclude .cargo, add libssl-dev); reads DATABASE_URL at runtime, serves /openapi.json + /graphql; wire FPA_FORGE_URL -> it
compose.real.yml (real gate + real forge PG + fdb-gateway + migrate one-shot + fabric stub) + run-real.sh; keep stub run.sh
Best-effort: build the full pgrx image (images/postgres18/Dockerfile — flint_llm/pg_net/pg_cron); time-boxed; converges -> proven for forge, stalls -> documented, smoke unaffected
